name: DarkStalkers
overview: The cosmic menace summons Dimitri, lord of the vampires, to launch a reign of terror-an unending plague of monsters intended to bring humanity to its knees! However, there's a heroic cabal of night warriors on the prowl as well - monstrous, awesome contenders with their own bizarre fighting powers! With their stage selected, these immortal creatures are locked in an epic battle to decide the fate of the world!
